blocks.text: Do androids dream of electric sheep? In 2040, Sulfox was enjoying the two-dimensional puzzle from Problem E when his custom AI mistook that enjoyment for a request for a greater challenge and generated an $n$-dimensional version.
The puzzle uses an $n$-dimensional hypercube with $2^n$ vertices, each carrying an on/off light. There are $2^n$ operations numbered from $0$ to $2^n-1$. For operation $i$:

items: Write $i$ in binary as $b_n b_{n-1}\cdots b_1$. Choose any $k$-face extending exactly along the dimensions with $b_j=1$, where $k$ is the number of set bits, and toggle every light on that face.

blocks.text: For example, operation $0$ toggles one vertex; operations $2^0,2^1,\ldots,2^{n-1}$ toggle the endpoints of one edge in the corresponding dimension; operation $2^n-1$ toggles all lights.

Sulfox cannot see the current state. He only hears a prompt whenever all lights are on after an operation. Find an operation sequence that guarantees hearing the prompt for every one of the $2^{2^n}$ initial states of the $2^n$ lights, and minimize its total cost. Output the minimum cost modulo $998244353$.

The first line contains $T$ ($1 \le T \le 10^4$). For each test case, the first line contains $n$ ($2 \le n \le 20$); the second line contains $2^n$ integers $a_0,a_1,\ldots,a_{2^n-1}$ ($1 \le a_i \le 10^6$). The sum of $2^n$ over all test cases does not exceed $2^{20}$.
For each test case, output the minimum total cost modulo $998244353$.
仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？2040 年，耳廓狐亚砜正在体验 Problem E 中的二维谜题，他的定制 AI 却误把这种乐趣理解成对更大挑战的渴望，于是生成了一个 $n$ 维版本。
谜题使用一个有 $2^n$ 个顶点的 $n$ 维超立方体，每个顶点有一盏开关灯。共有 $2^n$ 种操作，编号为 $0$ 到 $2^n-1$。对于操作 $i$：

items: 将 $i$ 的二进制表示写成 $b_n b_{n-1}\cdots b_1$。设其中 $1$ 的个数为 $k$，任选一个恰好沿所有满足 $b_j=1$ 的维度延伸的 $k$ 维面，并切换该面上所有顶点的灯。

blocks.text: 例如，操作 $0$ 切换单个顶点；操作 $2^0,2^1,\ldots,2^{n-1}$ 分别切换对应维度上一条边的两个端点；操作 $2^n-1$ 切换所有灯。
亚砜看不到当前状态；每当一次操作后所有灯均亮起，他才会听到提示音。请构造一个操作序列，使 $2^n$ 盏灯的 $2^{2^n}$ 种初始状态都能保证在某一步听到提示音，并最小化序列总代价。输出最小代价对 $998244353$ 取模后的结果。
第一行包含测试数据组数 $T$（$1 \le T \le 10^4$）。每组测试数据第一行包含 $n$（$2 \le n \le 20$）；第二行包含 $2^n$ 个整数 $a_0,a_1,\ldots,a_{2^n-1}$（$1 \le a_i \le 10^6$）。保证所有测试数据的 $2^n$ 之和不超过 $2^{20}$。
对每组测试数据，输出最小总代价对 $998244353$ 取模后的结果。

images.captionEn: The custom AI presents a higher-dimensional puzzle
images.captionZh: 定制 AI 展示高维谜题
